description: Use this API to modify or add new one data point to harmonics impedance characteristics table in the working case. This API is used to add one new data point of H, R/R0, L/L0 and C/C0 data to existing table of existing working case harmonics data. This can be used to change H, R/R0, L/L0 and C/C0 data points of existing harmonic number in the table. This API cannot be used to change table name. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = har_impchar_onept(name, hptold, hpt, rpt, lpt, cpt)
python_syntax: ierr = har_impchar_onept(name, hptold, hpt, rpt, lpt, cpt)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Harmonics impedance characteristics data table name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: hptold
parameters.description: Harmonics number at point in data table where provided data is added or changed. when hptold is specified and found, the h, r/r0, l/l0 and c/c0 values specified will be used to change existing data. when hptold is zero, the h, r/r0, l/l0 and c/c0 values specified will be used to add data point to existing data. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: hpt
parameters.description: New harmonics number to be added or changed at specified data point. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rpt
parameters.description: Impedance characteristics r/r0 for harmonics number hpt to be added or changed. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: lpt
parameters.description: Impedance characteristics l/l0 for harmonics number hpt to be added or changed. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: cpt
parameters.description: Impedance characteristics c/c0 for harmonics number hpt to be added or changed. (input; 1 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
